title: aster lateriflorus var. horizontalis
intro: Aster lateriflorus var. horizontalis, also known as the white wood's aster or calico aster, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the eastern United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aster lateriflorus var. horizontalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antihistamine, making it a popular remedy for allergies and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
